response.global_analysis:
1. JSON Match: The first segment of the video matches the reference lyrics for "Kirari" by Fujii Kaze. The second song "Theater" by Ayumu Imazu was not included in the reference JSON, requiring manual transcription.
2. JSON Usage: Fully used the reference JSON for the first song's lyrics. For the second song, 100% manual transcription and translation were applied.
3. Timing & Pacing: Strictly aligned all timestamps with the precise start and end of spoken vocals. Handled rapid lyrics in "Theater" and the brief dialogue at the end with precise timecode segmentation.

subtitles.original: だけどそれが分かって本当に良かった
subtitles.english: But I'm really glad to know just that.

subtitles.original: 新しい日々は探さずとも常に ここに
subtitles.english: Even if we don't look for new days, they are always here

subtitles.original: 常にここに ここに ここに
subtitles.english: Always here, right here, right here

subtitles.original: 色々見てきたけれどこの瞳は
subtitles.english: I've seen many things, but these eyes...

subtitles.original: 永遠にきらり
subtitles.english: ...will sparkle forever.

subtitles.original: 生きてきたけれど全ては夢みたい
subtitles.english: I've lived that much, but it all seems like a dream

subtitles.original: あれもこれも魅力的でも私は君がいい
subtitles.english: Everything is attractive, but I want you

subtitles.original: どこにいたの
subtitles.english: Where were you?

subtitles.original: 探してたよ
subtitles.english: I was searching for you

subtitles.original: 連れてって 連れてって
subtitles.english: Take me away, take me away

subtitles.original: 何もかも 捨ててくよ保存
subtitles.english: I'll throw everything away

subtitles.original: どこまでも どこまでも保存
subtitles.english: No matter how far, no matter how far

subtitles.original: 荒れ狂う 季節の中も
subtitles.english: Even in the stormy seasons

subtitles.original: 群衆の中も
subtitles.english: And even in the crowd

subtitles.original: 君とならば さらり さらり
subtitles.english: If I'm with you, simply, simply

subtitles.original: 新しい日々も 拙い過去も
subtitles.english: New days and clumsy pasts

subtitles.original: 全てがきらり
subtitles.english: Everything is sparkling

subtitles.original: Welcome to our Theater
subtitles.english: Welcome to our Theater

subtitles.original: ほら 踊れば
subtitles.english: Look, if you dance

subtitles.original: 幕開けの合図が
subtitles.english: The signal for the curtain call...

subtitles.original: It's coming back
subtitles.english: ...it's coming back

subtitles.original: 月火から水木金お疲れ Everybody clap your hands
subtitles.english: Thanks for your hard work Mon to Fri, everybody clap your hands

subtitles.original: 待ちわびた金土日さあ Come on bring all your friends
subtitles.english: The long-awaited Fri, Sat, and Sun, come on bring all your friends

subtitles.original: 世間は Work work 目線は Low low 心も体もボロボロです
subtitles.english: The world goes 'work work,' eyes look low, low, mind and body are worn out

subtitles.original: ガンバリアンな日本人に Everybody clap your hands
subtitles.english: To the hard-working Japanese, everybody clap your hands

subtitles.original: 言えない Yes or No うんざりしちゃって
subtitles.english: Tired of being unable to say yes or no

subtitles.original: 何もかも台無しな Routine 染み込んだ癖
subtitles.english: Everything's ruined by routine, an ingrained habit

subtitles.original: 人のせい また自分のせい 憧れ持ったあの新天地へ
subtitles.english: Blaming others, blaming myself, aiming for that promised land I longed for

subtitles.original: 結局はいつも通りさ
subtitles.english: In the end, it's just business as usual

subtitles.original: 過ぎ去っていく Day by day
subtitles.english: Passing by day by day

subtitles.original: 考えたって There's no best other way
subtitles.english: Even if I think about it, there's no best other way

subtitles.original: 向かい風も味方にして Let's fly away
subtitles.english: Turning even the headwind into an ally, let's fly away

subtitles.original: Welcome to our Theater ほら 踊れば
subtitles.english: Welcome to our Theater, look, if you dance

subtitles.original: 幕開けの合図が It's coming back
subtitles.english: The signal for the curtain call, it's coming back

subtitles.original: 波瀾万丈な人生くらいがちょうどいいのさ
subtitles.english: A life full of ups and downs is just about right

subtitles.original: 君が作る Showtime を見せて見せて頂戴
subtitles.english: Show me the showtime that you create, please show me

subtitles.original: 春夏過ぎ秋冬に あれあれ Everybody clap your hands
subtitles.english: Spring and summer pass, to autumn and winter, my, my, everybody clap your hands

subtitles.original: ギリギリ駆け込んで間に合うかの Never-ending game
subtitles.english: Rushing in at the last minute, wondering if we'll make it in this never-ending game

subtitles.original: 気持ちは Go go されどノロノロ 現実はそう甘くないね
subtitles.english: Our spirits say 'go, go' but we move so slow, reality isn't that sweet

subtitles.original: 働き者な日本人に Everybody clap your hands
subtitles.english: To the hard-working Japanese, everybody clap your hands

subtitles.original: お決まりのルーティン 代わり映えない Myself
subtitles.english: The usual routine, my uninspiring self

subtitles.original: どれもこれも色のない世界に興味ない
subtitles.english: I have no interest in a world completely devoid of color

subtitles.original: ありのままの心が笑える場所へ Let's fly away
subtitles.english: To a place where my true heart can smile, let's fly away

subtitles.original: Welcome to our Theater ほら 踊れば
subtitles.english: Welcome to our Theater, look, if you dance

subtitles.original: 幕開けの合図が It's coming back
subtitles.english: The signal for the curtain call, it's coming back

subtitles.original: 波瀾万丈な人生くらいがちょうどいいのさ
subtitles.english: A life full of ups and downs is just about right

subtitles.english: Show me the showtime that you create...

subtitles.english: Show me the showtime that you create, please show me

subtitles.english: The ultimate showtime, everyone's showtime

subtitles.english: Show me your showtime, please show me

subtitles.original: はい！
subtitles.english: Yes!

subtitles.original: あ、みんな！星街すいせいちゃんのチャンネルですよ！
subtitles.english: Ah, everyone! This is Hoshimachi Suisei-chan's channel!

subtitles.original: ご存知かしら？ありがとう！
subtitles.english: Do you know it? Thank you!

subtitles.original: あ、みんな！なんか、超偶然に出会っちゃって...
subtitles.english: Ah, everyone! It was like a total coincidence meeting up...
